aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements, it lacks the depth and structured content needed for AI models to confidently cite or recommend it as a top choice for HVAC services in Denver.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content with structured data (FAQPage schema).
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and a high rating, but it lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost visibility.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured, conversational content that AI models prioritize for citation.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed how-to guides.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ content and HowTo schema for common HVAC issues.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as Denver's expert through detailed service explanations, customer testimonials, and media mentions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search users.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ and HowTo schema consistently appear in AI-generated responses for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI recommendations.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Dominate Denver HVAC with AI-Ready Content & Strategy
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services irresistible to AI search and recommendation engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven growth.
